title: bupleurum lancifolium var. heterophyllum
intro: Bupleurum lancifolium var. heterophyllum, also known as Chinese kudzu root or Chai hu, is a plant species that belongs to the family Apiaceae. Traditionally used in Chinese medicine, it is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bupleurum lancifolium var. heterophyllum include reducing fever and inflammation, relieving stress and anxiety, and improving immune function. Bupleurum lancifolium var. heterophyllum is often prepared as a herbal decoction or infusion, and can also be found in capsule or tablet form in some herbal supplements.
